items.title: Adam Silver on the Kawhi trade:
items.author: Oh No He Didn't
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver on the Kawhi trade:

"I'm hopeful that it will wrap up this summer. The league did not pause the trade. The parties to the trade made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open. The investigation needs to run its course"

items.title: I definitely understand why people are annoyed that the Aspiration investigation has taken this long, but considering the significance and delicate nature, it’s probably for the best that the investigation wasn’t just rushed through for the sake of optics rather than accuracy.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: I definitely understand why people are annoyed that the Aspiration investigation has taken this long, but considering the significance and delicate nature, it’s probably for the best that the investigation wasn’t just rushed through for the sake of optics rather than accuracy.

items.title: Adam Silver says the Kawhi Leonard investigation isn't done, the report not finished but he expects a "summer" resolution.
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver says the Kawhi Leonard investigation isn't done, the report not finished but he expects a "summer" resolution.

"Yes, I would say this can be wrapped up — and needs to be wrapped up — before next season," he said at his board media session
